task.title: SC-12 真页 backend skeleton · guest_session + guest_rate_bucket Entity/Repo + AnonTokenService (HS256 24h JWT mint) + POST /api/anon/session · 6 IT testcase · 复用 anon.jwt.secret · 为 SC-12-T02 (presign/analyze) 奠基

audit_gate: audit.js v3 7 dims · 同前 || 红线: Backend IT ≥ 5 testcase 全绿 · POST /api/anon/session 真签发 anonToken (HS256) + DB guest_session 行 + Redis rate bucket 未启 (T01 不限流) · expiresAt = now+24h 严格验证

context.scenario:
SC-12 (P-GUEST-CAPTURE · Try Before Signup) 真页落地的第一片 · 后端骨架. P-LANDING F07A '试试看' CTA 现在跳 /guest/capture stub (SC-12-STUB-T01) · 本任务把 stub 背后的 backend 起脚 · 但 frontend 仍维持 stub 不动 (留 SC-12-T03 落真页). 本 task 范围:
  - guest_session + guest_rate_bucket JPA Entity + Repository (DDL 已 migrate 在 V20260421_02__init_anonymous.sql)
  - AnonTokenService: HS256 mint 24h TTL JWT (sub='anon:{guestSessionId}' · 复用 anon.jwt.secret · 同 iss/aud)
  - POST /api/anon/session: body {device_fp, ip_hash?, ua?, entry_source?, experiment_bucket?} → 创 guest_session 行 (status=0 INIT) + 返 {anonToken, anonSessionId, expiresAt}

关键复用: 同一 anon.jwt.secret (与 auth-service + SC-13/SC-13-SHARER 完全一致) · sub claim 用 'anon:{id}' 前缀以区分 student JWT (sub='${student_id}'). 后续 task (presign/analyze/result/claim) 都验证此前缀.

本 task **不含 frontend** · 不含 OSS presign · 不含 AI 分析 · 不含 claim · 仅 backend session-mint 端点 + 实体 + IT.
biz_refs: biz §4.10 guest_session DDL + guest_rate_bucket 关联表 (24h TTL · device_fp + ip_hash + status 0..9)
biz §2B.13 SC-12 F01 (POST /api/anon/session 入口 · 200 ms 预算 · 返 anonSessionId)
biz §2A.3.2 P-GUEST-CAPTURE API 触点 (anon_token 由前端 bootstrap 在 P-LANDING 进入时一次申请)
P-GUEST-CAPTURE spec.md §5 (X-Anon-Token 用于后续 /api/anon/file/presign /questions /analyze /result) · §15 Spec drift surface #1 (新规格 /api/anon/* 替代旧 /api/guest/*)
api_contracts_in_scope: POST /api/anon/session (NEW) · 无鉴权 (anon 入口) · body {deviceFp (required, max 128), ipHash?, ua?, entrySource? (whitelist {ad,qr,share,push,icon,deeplink,unknown}), experimentBucket?} → 200 {anonToken, anonSessionId, expiresAt} · 201 OK 也可 (沿 SC-13-SHARER pattern 返 200)
api_contracts_out_of_scope: POST /api/anon/file/presign (T02 范围 · 临时 OSS presign)
Quota / rate limit 429 QUOTA_EXHAUSTED (T06 范围 · Redis bucket + IP limit · 本 T01 不限流)
前端 P-GUEST-CAPTURE 真页 (T03 范围 · 本 T01 stub 不动)
AnonFilter (Spring WebFilter 校验 X-Anon-Token · T02 范围)
scope_in: 1. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/entity/GuestSession.java 新建 JPA Entity:

(a) @Table(name='guest_session') 字段映射 V20260421_02 DDL: id (Long PK · 不用 @GeneratedValue · client-assigned 与 ShareToken 同模式) · deviceFp (VARCHAR 128 NotNull) · ipHash · ua · entrySource · experimentBucket · imageTmpUrl · analysisResultJson (String 存 JSONB · @Column columnDefinition='jsonb' 暂用 String) · consentAt · consentType (Short) · status (Short NotNull default 0) · claimedByStudentId · claimedQuestionId · createdAt · expiresAt · claimedAt
(b) status enum 注释: 0 INIT · 1 CONSENTED · 2 UPLOADING · 3 UPLOADED · 4 ANALYZING · 5 ANALYZED · 6 FAILED · 7 EXPIRED · 8 CLAIMED · 9 ABANDONED
(c) 与 ShareToken 类似 · getters/setters 全 · 不用 Lombok
2. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/entity/GuestRateBucket.java 新建 JPA Entity:
(a) @Table(name='guest_rate_bucket') 字段: id (Long PK) · deviceFp · ipHash · date (LocalDate or OffsetDateTime · 看 DDL · 应该是 DATE 类型) · count (int default 0) · createdAt · updatedAt
(b) **本 task 不写入此表** · 仅建实体 + repo 为 T06 备料
3. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/repo/GuestSessionRepository.java 新建:
(a) extends JpaRepository<GuestSession, Long>
(b) findByIdAndStatusNot(Long id, short status) → for 后续 task 校验
(c) save / findById JpaRepository 默认提供
4. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/repo/GuestRateBucketRepository.java 新建:
(a) extends JpaRepository<GuestRateBucket, Long>
(b) findByDeviceFpAndDate(String deviceFp, LocalDate date) → Optional
5. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/service/AnonTokenService.java 新建:
(a) constructor: 注入 @Value('${anon.jwt.secret}') + issuer + audience + @Value('${anon.guest-session-ttl-sec:86400}') (24h default · 可配置)

(b) public String mintAnonToken(long guestSessionId): Jwts.builder() · sub='anon:'+guestSessionId · iss/aud 同 anon.jwt · jti=UUID · exp=now+ttl · 签 HS256 (复用 ShareTokenService.signingKey pattern · 不重复实例化 SecretKey)
(c) public long getGuestSessionTtlSeconds(): return configured ttl (T02 后续 controller 算 expiresAt 用)
(d) 不需 verify · verifyAnonToken 留 T02 加 (因为 T01 唯一 endpoint 不需 X-Anon-Token)
6. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/service/AnonSessionService.java 新建:
(a) constructor: 注入 GuestSessionRepository + AnonTokenService
(b) public AnonSessionMintResult mint(AnonSessionRequest req):
- id = System.nanoTime() (与 SC13ShareE2EIT seed 模式一致 · 不用 @GeneratedValue)
- now = OffsetDateTime.now() · expiresAt = now + 24h

- GuestSession g = new GuestSession() · g.id=id · g.deviceFp=req.deviceFp · g.ipHash=req.ipHash · g.ua=req.ua · g.entrySource=sanitize(req.entrySource) · g.experimentBucket=req.experimentBucket · g.status=0 · g.createdAt=now · g.expiresAt=expiresAt
- repo.save(g)
- anonToken = anonTokenService.mintAnonToken(id)
- return new AnonSessionMintResult(anonToken, id, expiresAt)
(c) sanitize(entrySource): 复用 ResolveRequest 或 telemetry 已有的 whitelist (ad/qr/share/push/icon/deeplink/unknown) · 非白名单返 'unknown'
7. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/dto/AnonSessionRequest.java 新建:
(a) 字段: deviceFp (@NotBlank @Size(max=128)) · ipHash? · ua? · entrySource? · experimentBucket?
8. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/dto/AnonSessionResponse.java 新建:
(a) 字段: anonToken (String) · anonSessionId (Long) · expiresAt (OffsetDateTime)
9. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/controller/AnonSessionController.java 新建:
(a) @PostMapping('/api/anon/session') · @Valid @RequestBody AnonSessionRequest
(b) → 调 anonSessionService.mint(req) → return ResponseEntity.ok(AnonSessionResponse{...})
(c) @ExceptionHandler(MethodArgumentNotValidException.class) → 400 + AnonErrorResponse (沿 SC-13 ShareErrorResponse pattern)
10. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/dto/AnonErrorResponse.java 新建 (或复用 ShareErrorResponse · 看 SC-13 实际类名):
(a) 字段 code + message (沿 SC-13 SHARE_TOKEN_INVALID 等 pattern)
11. backend/anonymous-service/src/main/resources/application.yml 加配置:
(a) anon.guest-session-ttl-sec: 86400 (24h · default)
12. backend/anonymous-service/src/test/java/com/longfeng/anonymousservice/SC12T01AnonSessionE2EIT.java 新建 IT (沿 IntegrationTestBase):

(a) mint_returns_200_with_anonToken_and_sessionId_and_db_row → POST 含 deviceFp='fp-001' · response (i) 200 (ii) anonToken 非空 (iii) anonSessionId 非空 (iv) expiresAt 与 now+24h 差 ≤ 5s (v) DB guest_session 行存在 (vi) Jwts.parser() 用 anon.jwt.secret 能验签 anonToken · sub='anon:'+anonSessionId (vii) g.status=0 INIT
(b) mint_without_device_fp_returns_400 → body={} 或 deviceFp 缺失 · 验 @NotBlank · 400 VALIDATION_FAILED
(c) mint_long_device_fp_returns_400 → deviceFp = 'x'*200 (超 128) · @Size 触发 · 400
(d) mint_invalid_entry_source_sanitized_to_unknown → entrySource='<script>alert(1)</script>' · DB 行 entrySource='unknown' (sanitize 生效)
(e) mint_persists_optional_fields_correctly → 含 ipHash + ua + experimentBucket · DB 行字段一一比对
(f) mint_token_sub_prefix_is_anon → 验 JWT decode 后 sub = 'anon:' + anonSessionId (不是裸 student id)
13. Regression 不破 · 既有所有 anonymous-service IT 全绿 (SC-13 4 + SC-13-SHARER 9 + SC-00-T01-T02 + SC-11-T01 等)
14. work_log 5 件齐 · adversarial.md ≥ 1 REJECT + ≥ 1 fix · 探索性 [device_fp 越界 · sub prefix · sanitize XSS · expiresAt clock drift · concurrent mint]
15. git commit 2-3 个:
(a) feat(SC-12-T01 backend): GuestSession + GuestRateBucket entity/repo + AnonTokenService + AnonSessionService + AnonSessionController + DTOs
(b) test(SC-12-T01): SC12T01AnonSessionE2EIT ≥ 5 testcase 全绿 + regression 既有 IT 仍绿
(c) chore(SC-12-T01): work_log + audit.js v3 PASS + inflight finalize
scope_out: AI 分析 + 轮询 + result endpoint (T02-T04)
前端 P-GUEST-CAPTURE 真页 (T03 · 本 task 不动 stub)
